events.summary: Tasks phase opened (retroactive — feature created after T1-T7 already shipped via PR #59 + #61). 23 tasks drafted from the 2026-05-08 audit synthesis.
events.retroactive_reason: Feature created post-hoc to capture the audit-driven enhancement rollup; the audit + 7 sub-tasks landed before the feature folder existed.

events.summary: Tasks approved with 23 entries (7 done + 16 pending). 17 audit findings already closed via T1-T7.

Implementation phase opened. T1-T7 already shipped via fitme-story PR #59 (95cb4d1, 13 files +319/-40, prod 05:11:20Z) and PR #61 (a548e5f, 3 files +130/-8, prod 05:31:23Z). FT2 audit docs shipped via PR #254 (f252ded, 6 files +1105). 16 tasks remain.

T16 (P-MOBNAV) MobileNav drawer implemented. PR #62 opened in fitme-story repo (branch feat/fitme-story-mobile-nav, commit e6c99e1). 3 files +187/-29: src/lib/nav.ts (new, shared NAV), src/components/MobileNav.tsx (new, native dialog), src/components/SiteHeader.tsx (refactored to use shared nav + render MobileNav). Closes V-004 P0 + partial V-005/V-009/A-001. tsc clean, next build passes 46 case-study pages.

T22+T23 (F7+F8 cross-repo gate parity) — 'document the asymmetry' disposition. Hook fix in .claude/settings.json (cwd-guard for observe-cache-hit.py) + new spec doc docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-08-cross-repo-gate-asymmetry.md. Closes recurring 30+ blocking-error notifications observed all session.

T8 (G3 dual-outlet pattern doc) shipped via FT2 chore PR. New doc at docs/case-studies/dual-outlet-pattern.md (~9 sections, 11KB). Establishes the contract between FT2 source case study and fitme-story slot MDX. Unblocks T9 (G5 timeline frontmatter audit) by giving G5 a concrete checklist (§7) to walk against.

T17 (P-MDX-CODE) rehype-pretty-code + CopyButton shipped via fitme-story PR #65 (commit d8893fe). 7 files +482/-5. Closes A-024 + R-008 + CS-004. Bonus: dev-guide page now also has heading anchors (CS-007 bonus). New deps rehype-pretty-code + shiki. Dual-theme github-light/dark.

T21 (FIG-W6) fitme-story design architecture doc. New doc at docs/design-system/fitme-story-design-architecture.md (~9 sections, ~16KB). Documents Tailwind v4 @theme tokens (brand + skill palette + neutrals + measures + type scale), dark mode WCAG contract (4 overrides), component architecture (4 layers), /design build contract (forward-looking for T18+), maintenance protocol.

T15 (P-CALLOUTS) callout component family shipped via fitme-story PR #66 (commit TBD). 6 files +330 lines: HonestDisclosure, TriggerIncident, MemoryRef, PredecessorChain, KillCriterionResolution. All server components, all dark-mode aware, all registered in mdx-components.tsx. Closes CS-014 + CS-024 + partial CS-008. Adoption (replacing existing prose patterns) deferred to T9 G5 timeline frontmatter audit.

Reconciliation pass: marked 10 silently-shipped tasks done (T8/T9/T11/T14/T15/T16/T17/T21/T22/T23). State 7/23 done → 17/23 done. Source: live audit of merged PRs vs state.json. Pending 6: T10/T12/T13/T18/T19/T20.

v7.8.1 invoked retroactively per user directive 2026-05-09. Rollup marked outlier_to_protocol with honest gap inventory. Case study created at docs/case-studies/fitme-story-public-enhancements-case-study.md with full v7.8.1 frontmatter (date_written, dispatch_pattern, success_metrics, kill_criteria, kill_criteria_resolution=deferred_until_complete, framework_version, work_type, tier_tags_present=true). T18 + T19 + T24 marked done with completed_at. T24 mobile-readiness PR #71 merged squash e675fe9. Phase B (port framework to fitme-story repo) and Phase C (cross-repo state sync) scoped + queued.

T10 (SEARCH-1) marked done — site-wide search shipped via fitme-story PR #70 squash 809a709 (2026-05-09). src/lib/search.ts + search-index.ts + search.test.ts + SearchInput component (expandable variant). PR scope expanded to also include full-width chrome refactor + Suspense wrap.

T12 (FIG-P4) marked done with REDUCED SCOPE: 22 representative wireframe frames built (vs 35 original target — case studies share template so 1+3 exemplars covers the surface). Built 2026-05-09 via Figma MCP on Screens page of file fsjHfFLAHELACZHku8Rfcl. Frames use FitMe Tokens (T19) for theming. No PR — Figma cloud is the artifact store. Per-route node IDs not captured (T20 forward work).

Component library bootstrap (17 components) shipped 2026-05-09 via Figma MCP use_figma calls — no PR (Figma cloud is the artifact store). 3 Buttons (Primary/Secondary/Ghost) · 3 Tags (Flagship/Standard/Tier-T1) · 5 Callouts (HonestDisclosure/TriggerIncident/MemoryRef/PredecessorChain/KillCriterionResolution) · 2 Cards (CaseStudy/FrameworkVersion) · 2 Search (Icon/Expanded) · 2 Layouts (SiteHeader/SiteFooter). All bound to FitMe Tokens collection via setBoundVariableForPaint. Per-component node IDs captured in state.json::figma_node_ids.components. Unblocks T20 Code Connect (status: blocked → ready, effort 1.5 → 0.5 days).

T20 (FIG-W5) Code Connect web integration shipped via fitme-story PR #75 (feat/web-code-connect-t20). Authored 12 .figma.tsx mapping files covering all 17 captured node IDs. Created 4 new primitive components (Button + Tag + CaseStudyCard + FrameworkVersionCard) per user-chosen create-primitives path. figma connect publish deferred to operator (FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN required). Rollup advances 22 → 23/24 done; only T13 (date-gated 2026-05-21) remains.
